testcase.name: submitOrder

failure.message: Unresolved compilation problem: The method stream() from the type Collection<WebElement> refers to the missing type Stream

testcase.failure:
java.lang.Error: Unresolved compilation problem: The method stream() from the type Collection<WebElement> refers to the missing type Stream
at pageObjects.productCatalogue.getProductByName(productCatalogue.java:37) at pageObjects.productCatalogue.addProductToCart(productCatalogue.java:44) at ravi.frameworks.e_commerce.submitOrder(e_commerce.java:29) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:104) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at
